Bash(BASE_RES="/Users/almagro/Documents/gitlab/patient/app/build/intermediates/packaged_res/userEnvProdRelease/packageUserEnvProdReleaseResources"
AAR_CONTENTS="/tmp/aar_extract/aar_contents"

echo "=== Conflicts in all drawable densities ==="
find "$AAR_CONTENTS/res" -mindepth 2 -name "*.xml" | while read f; do
  rel="${f#$AAR_CONTENTS/res/}"
  base_file="$BASE_RES/$rel"
  if [ -f "$base_file" ]; then
    if ! diff -q "$f" "$base_file" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
      echo "CONFLICT: $rel"
    fi
  fi
done
echo "Done")
